creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yeah, you can set smartd_flags="-s /var/db/smartd" in /etc/rc.conf and it will be passed to the daemon. (You'll need to create the dir and check ownership/permission of course) See rc.subr(8):

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=rc.subr&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+12.0-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html

Closing
